channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Toronto Police Report Highlights Disproportionate Impact of Hate Crimes on Jewish Community in 2025
item.description: In 2025, Jews in Toronto were disproportionately affected by religion-motivated hate crimes, representing 82% of all such incidents according to the Toronto Police Service. Anti-Muslim crimes accounte...

item.title: African Firms Urged to Scale Up AI for Real Business Growth
item.description: African companies are moving quickly to try out artificial intelligence (AI), but the big challenge is turning those small experiments into serious business results. A new PwC report shared at the Afr...

item.title: Litton Guides Bangladesh to 278 After Top-Order Collapse in Sylhet Test
item.description: In the second and final Test against Pakistan, Litton Das played a crucial innings to rescue Bangladesh from a precarious position. The visitors, reduced to 116-6 after lunch, were rescued by Litton’s...

item.title: BJP Prepares Strategically for Assembly Elections Across Seven States
item.description: Following their significant victories in West Bengal and Bihar, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is now gearing up for crucial assembly elections in seven states, including Uttar Pradesh (UP) and Punj...

item.title: Manchester City win FA Cup with Semenyo's decisive second-half goal
item.description: Manchester City secured a domestic cup double by defeating Chelsea 1-0 in the FA Cup final at Wembley. The match was largely uneventful with few clear chances, but a moment of brilliance decided the o...

item.title: Siya Kolisi shines as Sharks finish URC season with big win over Zebre
item.description: Springbok captain Siya Kolisi concluded his tenure at the Sharks in spectacular fashion during their final United Rugby Championship match of the season against Zebre Parma. On a sunny Saturday at Kin...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of Top Gun: 40 Years of Cinematic Innovation
item.description: Top Gun, the iconic action drama directed by Tony Scott and produced by Jerry Bruckheimer, celebrates its 40th anniversary. The film, co-written by Jack Epps Jr. and Jim Cash, propelled Tom Cruise to ...

item.title: Sixty Couples Receive Free Weddings on Former MP T.G. Venkatesh’s Birthday in Kurnool
item.description: On 16th May 2026, Kurnool witnessed a generous initiative as Minister for Industries and Commerce, Mr. T.G. Bharath, organised free weddings for 60 couples. This event was held to commemorate the birt...

item.title: Exploring Forgotten Histories of Malaysia through Sharmini Aphrodite’s Short Stories
item.description: Sharmini Aphrodite’s collection, 'The Unrepentant', published by New York-based indie press Gaudy Boy, is a deeply engaging exploration of Malaysia’s past through fourteen carefully crafted short stor...

item.title: Tanzania ranks ninth in Africa for high fuel prices in May 2026
item.description: Tanzania has entered the list of top ten African countries with the highest fuel prices as of May 2026, recording an average of $1.587 per litre. This puts the country at ninth place in Africa and 67t...

item.title: G22 and VXON to perform ‘Gen Z Live’ concerts in Davao and Cebu this July
item.description: Filipino music fans have something exciting to look forward to this July as popular P-pop groups G22 and VXON announce their upcoming concerts under the event titled 'Gen Z Live.' The shows are set to...

item.title: Alfred Stevens: Belgian Master Painter of Elegant 19th-Century Parisian Women
item.description: Alfred Stevens (1823–1906) was a prominent Belgian painter celebrated for his detailed portrayals of high-society women in Paris during the Second Empire period. Known for his exceptional technical sk...

item.title: Spain withdraws from Eurovision amid disagreement over Israeli entry
item.description: Spain has announced its decision to boycott this year's Eurovision Song Contest due to the participation of Israel, a move that has sparked mixed reactions among fans of the competition. Supporters of...

item.title: Ruth Odinga Reveals Childhood Relationship with Senator Onyonka During Funeral
item.description: During the funeral of Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka's mother on May 15, 2026, Kisumu Woman Representative Ruth Odinga surprised attendees by revealing that she and Onyonka were childhood sweethearts. ...

item.title: Report urges Africa to build own satellite systems and strengthen digital sovereignty
item.description: African governments are being encouraged to put more money in local satellite and digital infrastructure so that the continent can reduce dependence on foreign companies. A fresh report launched in Ki...

item.title: Potential Motor Oil Shortages in the U.S. Amid Tensions with Iran
item.description: Reports indicate that the United States could soon face shortages of motor oil due to ongoing military tensions with Iran. The situation has drawn comparisons to the toilet paper shortages seen during...

item.title: MP Ndindi Nyoro Seeks Emergency Parliament Sitting to Address Rising Fuel Prices
item.description: Kiharu MP Ndindi Nyoro has formally written to Speaker Moses Wetangula requesting that Parliament reconvene from recess for an emergency session. The purpose is to deliberate on proposed amendments to...

item.title: Delta Goodrem Sells Out European and UK Tour Ahead of Eurovision Grand Final
item.description: Australian singer Delta Goodrem has announced that her upcoming European and UK tour is completely sold out just hours before she performs in the 2026 Eurovision Grand Final. The 41-year-old shared th...

item.title: Pietermaritzburg High Court Orders Zuma Arms Deal Trial to Proceed Despite Appeals
item.description: The Pietermaritzburg High Court has ruled that the long-delayed arms deal trial involving former president Jacob Zuma and company Thales must proceed, despite pending appeals. Legal expert Bongani Zac...

item.title: MBA Forex Trial Adjourned to June 3 Following Defendant’s Bereavement
item.description: The Federal High Court in Port Harcourt don adjourn the trial of MBA Trading and Capital Investment Limited (MBA Forex) and their representatives go June 3, 2026. The defendants, wey include Precious ...
